settings.question: Can I use this on wet or dry hair?
settings.answer: Yes, both! Apply to damp hair before styling or to dry hair for a finishing touch.

settings.question: Will it make my hair look greasy?
settings.answer: Not at all. Its lightweight formula absorbs quickly for a silky finish.

settings.question: Is it safe for color-treated hair?
settings.answer: Yes, it is safe and helps enhance the shine and vibrancy of your color.

settings.question: Does it provide heat protection?
settings.answer: Yes, it creates a protective barrier against damage from heat styling tools.

settings.question: How much should I use?
settings.answer: Apply 1-2 pumps depending on hair length and thickness, focusing on mid-lengths to ends.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about salon-smooth hair at home.
